meaning: n.(金属熔化时浮升至表面的)渣滓,无用之物
examples: For those works, we might discard the dross and select the essence as well.
Slag, dross (other than granulated slag), scalings and other waste from the manufacture of iron or steel.
His three great albums will last as long as electronic media continues to exist, while the dross is forgotten.
Now more than ever, what is treasure today is likely to be dross tomorrow.
Seemingly overnight, Amazon turned those big bookstore powerhouse assets into anchors of lead and dross.
